raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I paid {$5100.00} to XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX  for time sensitive legal services using my American Express card. However, XXXX XXXX failed to provide the agreed upon services. Thus, I asked American Express to stop payment. 

XXXX XXXX did not disagree that they failed to provide services. However, American Express has made a series of errors in which I have been billed XXXX times for services in the amounts of {$5100.00} ( XX/XX/XXXX ), {$5100.00} ( XX/XX/XXXX ), and {$5100.00} ( XX/XX/XXXX ) ; then credited on XX/XX/XXXX and XX/XX/XXXX in the amounts of {$5100.00} each. This means I still owe {$5100.00} for services that I did not receive! American Express refuses to correct their mistake. 

My phone calls to American Express have been useless. 

This is no way to treat a rewards member.
